CONTENT.Club career: Mikael made his professional debut for SPAL on the 14 August 2021, replacing Moustapha Yabre during the 2–1 Coppa Italia loss against Benevento, just a few days after scoring a brace in the 5–0 friendly win against Adriese.On 30 August 2021, Mikael signed a five-year contract for Spezia; on the same day he returned to SPAL on loan until 2022.On 26 January 2023, Mikael joined Venezia in Serie B and signed a contract through the 2026–27 season.
CONTENT.Career statistics: As of 1 June 2024As of match played 26 March 2024Scores and results list Iceland's goal tally first.
CONTENT.International career: Born in the Iceland to an Icelandic father and Indonesian mother. Mikael is eligible to play for both countries, but decided to represent his birth nation.Having played for the country at youth level, he made his debut for the Iceland national team on 8 October 2021 in a World Cup qualifier against Armenia.

SUMMARY: Mikael Egill Ellertsson (born 11 March 2002) is an Icelandic professional footballer who plays for Italian Serie A club Venezia and the Iceland national team.
